'''''Aramadia''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] used by the [[Duskhan League]].<ref name="CATCW" />

==Characteristics==
Like all Super Star Destroyers, the ''Aramadia'' was a wedge-shaped [[Warship/Legends|warship]] and at least several kilometers in length. The vessel was fitted with a secret [[slave circuit]] system that linked it to other Imperial ships captured by the Yevethans. When activated, the vessel's controls were overridden and the craft could be remotely controlled.<ref name="CATCW" />

==History==
After [[Nil Spaar]] used the [[Aramadia (Aramadia-class)|lead ship]] of the [[Aramadia-class thrustship|''Aramadia''-class]] on his diplomatic journey to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]],<ref name="BTS">''[[Before the Storm]]''</ref> one of the captured [[Black Fleet]] Super Star Destroyers was used during the [[Battle of N'zoth]], going by this name as well.<ref name="CATCW" /> This ''Aramadia'' served as one of Nil Spaar's [[Flagship/Legends|flagships]],<ref name="CATCW" /> but had another commander during the battle, as Spaar was onboard the [[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Pride of Yevetha'']] at the time.<ref name="TT">''[[Tyrant's Test]]''</ref>

The ship, along with the ''Pride of Yevetha'' and seven other Imperial vessels, was retaken by Imperial personnel led by [[Sil Sorannan]] when they rebelled against their Yevethan masters. After reaching the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]], the vessel was seemingly abandoned by Sorannan and his forces.<ref name="CATCW" />

The vessel was later recovered, decommissioned and the Yevethans had it brought to N'zoth, where it was landed in a cordoned part of the [[Hariz Downside]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] and preserved as a symbol of inspiration to future Yevethans.<ref name="CATCW" />

One of its cargo bays was turned into a trophy room and the ship was used as a museum, displaying such curiosities as a pair of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] and the green gem, the [[Eye of Deth]]. It was claimed these valuables were taken during the [[Yevethan Purge]].<ref name="CATCW" />
